title: initiative.version_created event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.6. Produced by epd2_initiative_service.events.build_version_created_event, payload=initiative_version_state_payload(version). Deliberately excludes every InitiativeVersion content field (title, problem_statement, ...) from the wire event - only the minimal, canonically-hashable identity/content-hash snapshot travels; see initiative_version_full_state_payload for the complete state used by Audit Core's after_hash.
